'''dhamofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oofiness|oofiness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oofiness|oofiness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhamofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæmefeth|dhæmefeth]] || [[word:dhæmefej|dhæmefej]] || [[word:dhæmefesh|dhæmefesh]] || [[word:dhæmefe|dhæmefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhamomofoth|dhamomofoth]] || [[word:dhamomofoj|dhamomofoj]] || [[word:dhamomofosh|dhamomofosh]] || [[word:dhamomofo|dhamomofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhamofoth|dhamofoth]] || [[word:dhamofoj|dhamofoj]] || [[word:dhamofosh|dhamofosh]] || [[word:dhamofo|dhamofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhamoffoth|dhamoffoth]] || [[word:dhamoffoj|dhamoffoj]] || [[word:dhamoffosh|dhamoffosh]] || [[word:dhamoffof|dhamoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhamofotho|dhamofotho]] || [[word:dhamofojo|dhamofojo]] || [[word:dhamofosho|dhamofosho]] || [[word:dhamofoko|dhamofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhamofoth|dhamofoth]] || [[word:dhamofoj|dhamofoj]] || [[word:dhamofosh|dhamofosh]] || [[word:dhamofo|dhamofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhamofothol|dhamofothol]] || [[word:dhamofojol|dhamofojol]] || [[word:dhamofoshol|dhamofoshol]] || [[word:dhamofokol|dhamofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhamofothotho|dhamofothotho]] || [[word:dhamofojojo|dhamofojojo]] || [[word:dhamofoshosho|dhamofoshosho]] || [[word:dhamofoko|dhamofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhamofothon|dhamofothon]] || [[word:dhamofojon|dhamofojon]] || [[word:dhamofoshon|dhamofoshon]] || [[word:dhamofokon|dhamofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhamofothoro|dhamofothoro]] || [[word:dhamofojoro|dhamofojoro]] || [[word:dhamofoshoro|dhamofoshoro]] || [[word:dhamofokoro|dhamofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
